heading: Limitations
body:
The `on` field has special requirements for `$merge` against
sharded collections. To learn more, see
[$merge syntax](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/merge).

`$merge` can't write to [time series collections](manual/core/timeseries-collections). To write documents to time series
collections, use the [$emit](atlas-sp-agg-emit) stage.

You need to have [Configure Database Users](add-mongodb-users) to use
`$merge` on sharded collections.
